skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem: During a portion of a flight, a passenger jet's cruising speed varied between 220 miles per hour and 240 miles per hour. Which inequality best represents this situation, where s is the cruising speed, in miles per hour, during this portion of the flight?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The speed varies between 220 and 240, inclusive, so 220 ≤ s ≤ 240.

Other choices describe only one bound or use an unrelated value.
